holdings.infoBox: EMET is an equity ETF with a total of 64 individual holdings. The top holdings are Freeport-McMoRan stock at 8.62%, Glencore at 8.37%, Anglo American at 8.14%, Grupo Mexico Sab De Cv at 6.82%, and Teck Resources at 6.02%.

overview.description: The VanEck Copper and Electrification Metals ETF (EMET) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Clean-Tech Metals index. The fund tracks a market cap-weighted index of global companies across the value chain of critical metals used in worldwide electrification efforts, including production, refining, processing, and recycling. EMET was launched on Nov 9, 2021 and is issued by VanEck.
